name: catalog validator rejects a source_class that is not in the known taxonomy used by the namespace mapping
command:
mkdir -p sources && printf 'id: bad
source_class: random-blog
tier: 1
applies_to: [node]
' > sources/bad.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-source.sh" --source sources/bad.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'source_class' err.txt && grep -q 'random-blog' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
